inputs.text: Main thoda bukhar aur thakan mehsoos kar raha hoon
Ab mujhe khansi bhi ho rahi hai, lekin kalee khansi hai

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Dry cough could be a sign of bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Still a possibility, but less likely

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Still less likely, no specific symptoms

inputs.text: Main raat ko bahut pasina aata hoon, aur mere vajan bhi kam ho raha hai, khansi abhi bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Raat ko pasina, wazan kam hona, and khansi for more than 2 weeks are cardinal signs of Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Less likely, as symptoms have progressed beyond bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Possible, but less likely than Tuberculosis

inputs.text: Ab mujhe bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, aur mujhe lagta hai ki mere balgam mein khoon hai

hypotheses.label: Tuberculosis
hypotheses.rationale: Severe weakness and possible hemoptysis confirm Tuberculosis

hypotheses.label: Bronchitis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms have progressed beyond bronchitis

hypotheses.label: Pneumonia
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out, as symptoms are more specific to Tuberculosis
